page_content:
HNUH398T Global Health Challenges and Water Security (3 Credits) An examination of questions and issues of global health and water security. Expert practitioners will also visit class and participate in discussions. Cross-listed with: FGSM390. Restriction: Must be in the Global Fellows Program; and permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: HNUH398T, HONR378M, or FGSM390.

HONR208 Honors Seminar (1-3 Credits) Restriction: Permission of University Honors Program. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
